EmailTemplate.description: Email to shift approval manager with new PIN
EmailTemplate.name: AN - PIN Creation Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Your shift approval PIN
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
YOUR ALLIANCE NURSING SHIFT APPROVAL PIN CODE.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You've been appointed as a Shift Approval Manager by your employer. This means you’re now authorised to approve timesheets on behalf of your facility for Alliance Nursing on-hire staff.
To approve a timesheet in the Alliance Connect app, you need your personal PIN code:
{!Contact.Shift_Approval_PIN_Number__c}
Simply review the timesheet in the Alliance Connect app. Enter your PIN and signature. Done!
If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us at 1300 034 494 — we’re here to help!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
